text: WARM SPRINGS SENIOR WELLNESS CENTER WARM SPRINGS SENIOR WELLNESS CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides home delivered meals to medically referred clients. 2331 High Lookee Warm Springs, OR 97761 Eligibility: Age 60 and older on the Warm Springs Reservation Hours: Varies Email (541) 553-3313 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 553-3313 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Warm Springs Services: Home Delivered Meals * Native American Community If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
